Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Bellowing Horror]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Bellowing Horror is a pet that the crew normally keeps sealed up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — A Bellowing Horror is also commonly known as a Bellows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — A Bellowing Horror is something people can have a link to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — A Bellowing Horror is an Elderspawn with a simple, unfathomable, alien mind.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Calder carries a Bellowing Horror.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — The Bellowing Horror is a creature meant to unnerve the minds of men by repeating vile and disturbing parts of conversations.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Bellowing Horror is an entity Calder gestures away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Bellowing Horror is an entity that preened and chuckled.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
